inputs.label: Core Sleep Duration (hours)
inputs.businessContext: The main sleep block duration in hours, usually 2-4 hours in polyphasic schedules.

businessContext_i18n.en: The main sleep block duration in hours, usually 2-4 hours in polyphasic schedules.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Polifazik programlarda genellikle 2-4 saat olan ana uyku bloğu süresi (saat).
businessContext_i18n.de: Dauer des Hauptschlafblocks in Stunden, normalerweise 2-4 Stunden bei polyphasischen Schlafplänen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée du bloc de sommeil principal en heures, généralement 2 à 4 heures dans les horaires polyphasiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración del bloque principal de sueño en horas, normalmente 2-4 horas en horarios polifásicos.

inputs.label: Number of Naps
inputs.businessContext: Total number of short nap periods per day (typically 1-6).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of short nap periods per day (typically 1-6).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük toplam kısa şekerleme periyodu sayısı (genellikle 1-6).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der kurzen Nickerchen pro Tag (normalerweise 1-6).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de courtes siestes par jour (généralement 1 à 6).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de siestas cortas por día (normalmente 1-6).

inputs.label: Nap Duration (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Length of each nap in minutes (common ranges: 15-25 min).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of each nap in minutes (common ranges: 15-25 min).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her şekerlemenin dakika cinsinden süresi (yaygın aralık: 15-25 dk).
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge jedes Nickerchens in Minuten (übliche Bereiche: 15-25 Min.).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée de chaque sieste en minutes (plage courante : 15-25 min).
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de cada siesta en minutos (rangos comunes: 15-25 min).

inputs.label: Sleep Goal (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Your desired total sleep target for comparison (standard is 7-9 hours).

businessContext_i18n.en: Your desired total sleep target for comparison (standard is 7-9 hours).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Karşılaştırma için istediğiniz toplam uyku hedefi (standart 7-9 saat).
businessContext_i18n.de: Ihr gewünschtes Gesamtschlafziel zum Vergleich (Standard ist 7-9 Stunden).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Votre cible de sommeil total souhaitée pour comparaison (standard : 7 à 9 heures).
businessContext_i18n.es: Su objetivo de sueño total deseado para comparación (estándar es 7-9 horas).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
